# Suspended Ceiling Cross-Trade Coordination: Managing the Interface Between Biosafety Equipment Frames and Cleanroom Ceiling Systems

## 适用受众
Site_Supervisor

## 写作角度说明
与装修吊顶的交叉作业协调是洁净区安装现场主管的核心工作之一。生物安全设备（特别是传递窗、换鞋柜等）的顶部通常与吊顶系统连接，吊顶安装顺序不当会造成密封失效、污染泄漏等严重问题。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Routing cleanroom ceiling grid members through the space reserved for biosafety equipment service clearance — without coordination with the equipment installer — makes filter replacement and seal maintenance physically impossible without ceiling disassembly.

## 参考素材
- Ceiling-grid sequencing: install biosafety equipment first → coordinate ceiling grid layout around equipment perimeter → install ceiling panels with removable sections above equipment service points
- Service clearance requirement: minimum 600 mm clear access above pass boxes for filter replacement, HEPA housing service side clearance per manufacturer specification
- Coordination meeting: hold a dedicated coordination meeting between equipment installer, ceiling contractor, and HVAC contractor before ceiling grid installation, record agreed service clearance zones
- Sealing interface: continuous silicone seal between equipment top flange and ceiling panel, install sealant before ceiling grid completion to ensure access
- Handover checkpoint: ceiling contractor cannot seal final perimeter until equipment installer confirms top-flange sealant application is complete and witnessed

## 关键词
Ceiling Coordination, Cross-Trade Interface, Service Clearance, Cleanroom Ceiling, Installation Sequence, Coordination Meeting
